biological_replicate: Each venom dose group consisted of 5 CD-1 mice
technical_replicate: Each venom-antivenom mixture (n = 4) was intravenously injected into a group of male CD-1 mice
experimental_design: the comparative preclinical evaluation of the second-generation antivenom and its conventional counterparts
factor_value: second-generation antivenom and its conventional counterparts
number_of_fractions: three batches (SIIPL-01, SIIPL-02, and SIIPL-03) of the ‘second-generation’ antivenom (10 L)
number_of_biological_replicates: Each venom dose group consisted of 5 CD-1 mice
number_of_samples: Each venom dose group consisted of 5 CD-1 mice
